_comment: Slimeknightium — a tribute alloy of red slime + iron. 4 red_slime (576 mB) + 4 iron (576 mB) → 1 slimeknightium ingot (144 mB). Requires 1700 °C (slimeknightium's own melt temp) so iron alone isn't hot enough — needs at least the heat that iron + the latent slime contribute. Override at the same data path to retune.
